framing: filters F1/F2 were pre-specified in the design doc Build Log BEFORE evaluation (persistence-filter practice per Kaminsky-Lizondo-Reinhart); evaluated on the step-5 forward window; n=1 shock -> case-study numbers guiding config defaults, not validated rates
config_decision: expose alert_filters.min_breach_run and alert_filters.require_changepoint in config; defaults chosen from these numbers and documented in the README
